TITLE: Update your account after an email address change

SECTIONS.ISSUE_TEXT: Need to update your ESET account with a new email address
SECTIONS.ISSUE_LINK: Are you a North American customer? Click here
SECTIONS.STEP_1_TEXT: Visit the Contact Technical Support page.
SECTIONS.STEP_2_TEXT: Select the type of user that applies.
SECTIONS.HOME_USERS_TEXT: click Home User Support → Other question or feedback → Update my license information → Click the red button, bottom right (Contact Technical Support)
SECTIONS.BUSINESS_USERS_TEXT: click Business & Enterprise (Server Product) Support → Other system issue or question → Change account information → Click the red button, bottom right (Contact Technical Support)
SECTIONS.STEP_3_TEXT: On the Contact Technical Support page, enter your new email address, fill in all the required information and then click Send. ESET Technical Support will process your request and notify you when your email address has been updated. If more information is needed, ESET Technical Support will contact you via email.
SECTIONS.NA_SECTION_TITLE: Are you a North American customer?
SECTIONS.NA_STEP_1_TEXT: Visit the Contact ESET Technical Support page.
SECTIONS.NA_STEP_2_TEXT: Select the options that apply to you:
SECTIONS.NA_HOME_USERS_TEXT: Click Home User Support → Other issue or feedback (none of the above) → Update my license Information → Click the red button, bottom right (Contact Technical Support)
SECTIONS.NA_BUSINESS_USERS_TEXT: Click Business & Enterprise (Server Product) Support → Other system issue or question → Change Account Information → Click the red button, bottom right (Contact Technical Support)
SECTIONS.NA_STEP_3_TEXT: In the Update my license information form, include as much of the following information as possible in the Description field:
SECTIONS.INFO_SALES_ORDER: Your sales order number (found in the original order confirmation message)
SECTIONS.INFO_NEW_EMAIL: Your new email address (the email address you would like to update your ESET account with)
SECTIONS.INFO_OLD_EMAIL: The email address you submitted at the time that you purchased your ESET product
SECTIONS.INFO_CREDENTIALS: Your ESET-issued Username, Password, or License Key
SECTIONS.INFO_CREDENTIALS_LINK: I do not have this information
SECTIONS.INFO_ADDITIONAL_EMAILS: Any additional previous email addresses that may be associated with your ESET account
SECTIONS.NA_STEP_4_TEXT: Click Send to email ESET Technical support. ESET Technical Support will process your request and notify you when your email address has been updated. If more information is needed, ESET Technical Support will contact you via email.
